backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages fitness services (CRUD operations) and returns static business info for Bodyshape Fitness, including blob storage mixin integration.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features documented.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files documenting the Bodyshape Fitness website structure, components, and content.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode color variables for the fitness brand theme.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags for Bodyshape Fitness personal training business in Dallas, TX.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with Home and Locations routes wrapped in a Layout component.
Audio player component with play/pause, mute, and volume controls that persists user preferences to localStorage and plays royalty-free workout music.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallery.tsx: Interactive gallery displaying 6 gym facility photos in a responsive grid with hover effects and modal dialog for enlarged image viewing.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with Bodyshape Fitness branding, responsive navigation with mobile menu, BackgroundMusic integration, and footer with Kentucky location details and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LocationCard.tsx: Reusable card component displaying location details (address, phone, hours) with icons in a styled card format.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: React component that displays customer testimonials in a grid layout with star ratings, review text, reviewer names, and dates. Includes a 5-star badge at the bottom and uses data from the reviews module.
frontend/src/data/reviews.ts: Exports a Review interface and an array of six 5-star customer testimonials with reviewer names, ratings, review text, and dates ranging from April to September 2025.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state. Invalidates and refetches dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle. Provides login, logout, and authentication status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file for React Query hooks that would interact with the backend. Currently exports nothing as no backend queries are needed for the static content site.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes using a dark grey/black background with red text and gold accent colors. Imports Inter and Bebas Neue fonts and defines fitness brand color scheme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component featuring a hero section with background image, manager profile section for Allen D., info cards, testimonials section, and image gallery. Displays gym features, benefits, and contact information.
frontend/src/pages/Locations.tsx: Locations page component displaying Bodyshape Fitness location details including address, phone, hours, embedded Google Maps, and contact information in a card-based layout.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, typography plugins, container queries, animations (accordion), custom fonts (Inter, Bebas Neue), and extended theme tokens for a design system.
project_state.json: Project state file for Bodyshape Fitness gym website tracking two pending feature requests to add/update a 'What Our Members Say' testimonials section with 6 specific member reviews including names, dates, ratings, and feedback content.
